sentence: Your analvision of a nichiteral film will outlast the film itself.

wombos.definition: A subjective, first-person analysis or retelling of an event — emphasizing one particular viewpoint or interpretation. Less obsessive than a peanemis; more about personal perspective.
Used to emphasize that something is not just niche — it is specifically, precisely, literally niche. Intensifies niche beyond casual use. 'That reference was nichiteral.'
